message.thinking:
We need to answer 3 questions. For each, produce a JSON object with keys: "question", "feedback", "complies". "question" should be one word: Chapters/Description/Structure depending on question. So first question: "Chapters". Provide feedback about whether the text lists main sections. The text: "Šajā darbā līdzības jeb plaģiātisma problemātika tiek apskatīta konceptu karšu kontekstā. Lai veiksmīgi izpildīt uzdevumus un sasniegtu bakalaura darba mērķi, ir jāaplūko ne tikai līdzības noteikšanas jēdziens, bet arī jāpēta konceptu karšu būtība un jāatrod risinājums, kas ļautu noteikt līdzības konceptu kartēs." It's a single paragraph, not listing chapters. So it does not comply. Provide feedback.

Second question: Description. Does it briefly describe contents of each section. No list, no description. So does not comply.

Third: Structure. Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No. So does not comply.

All three comply: false. Provide feedback accordingly.

We need to output array of three objects in order. Ensure JSON syntax.
